title: DAY 05 — CRM-M5 — BIK WHATSAPP & CAMPAIGN OPERATIONS + CRM-M13 — CUSTOMER FAQ BANK

questions.question: Before responding to any chat in BIK, what must the CRM Executive do?

options.text: Check the customer's order value in FIMS to determine the priority of the response
Send a greeting message first, then read the conversation history
Read the full conversation history before replying — never reply without context
Apply the correct FAQ Bank category tag before opening the chat

questions.question: When can a BIK chat be marked as Closed?

options.text: As soon as the Executive sends a reply — the customer can follow up if needed
Once the customer's question is fully answered OR a clear next step with specific timeline has been communicated
After 24 hours of no reply from the customer — auto-closure is standard
Only after the Asst Manager reviews and approves the resolution

questions.question: Which BIK sheet column captures the category of issue discussed in the chat?

options.text: Description
Platform
Interaction Type
Chat Status

questions.question: A customer on WhatsApp asks: "My shipment shows delivered but I haven't received it — what do I do?" Which approved answer is correct?

options.text: "Please check your nearest post office — courier partners sometimes leave parcels there."
"Check with your neighbours, security guard, or delivery person first. If still not found, contact us within 24 hours and we'll raise a dispute. Investigation may take 7–10 working days."
"We will automatically raise a dispute after 48 hours — no action needed from your side."
"Please raise a complaint on the courier partner's website directly and share the reference number with us."

questions.question: A customer asks: "Can I get a refund for my Prototype watch?" What is the correct answer?

options.text: "Yes — Prototype watches follow the standard 10-day return policy like all other orders."
"No. Prototype watches are non-refundable. However, if there is a manufacturing defect, you can request a replacement within 10 days of delivery."
"Refunds for Prototype watches are processed within 15 business days after QC."
"You can return it within 45 days — that is the feedback window."

questions.question: A customer asks how they can claim warranty for their Sylvi watch. What is the first step in the approved repair procedure?

options.text: Ship the watch directly to Sylvi's warehouse with the order invoice
Call Sylvi on +91-9687660234 and request a pickup slot
Record a 10–20 second video clearly showing the issue and send it via WhatsApp to +91-9687660234
Fill the warranty claim form on sylvi.in and wait for an email confirmation

questions.question: A customer says their refund was initiated 12 days ago and they still haven't received it. Their bank confirms no pending transaction. What is the correct action?

options.text: Ask the customer to wait another 5 business days — delays are common during festive periods
Check the order status in FIMS and tell the customer the refund is on its way
Escalate to the CRM Asst Manager via `after-sale-services` Slack immediately
Raise a dispute on the payment gateway portal directly and inform the customer

questions.question: A customer asks: "What is a Certified Imperfect watch and how is it different from a refurbished watch?" What is the key distinction in the approved answer?

options.text: Certified Imperfect watches are previously returned and re-packaged; refurbished watches are repaired products
Certified Imperfect watches are brand-new and never worn with disclosed minor cosmetic flaws; refurbished watches are previously used, repaired, and restored
Both are the same — the terms are used interchangeably at Sylvi
Certified Imperfect watches have a reduced warranty (6 months); refurbished watches carry the full 1-year warranty

questions.question: A customer reports that a wrong product was delivered, but when asked, they confirm they did not take an unboxing video. What is the correct action?

options.text: Proceed with raising the dispute regardless — unboxing videos are recommended, not required
Instruct the customer to courier the wrong product back and await a replacement
Escalate to the CRM Asst Manager via `after-sale-services` Slack within 1 hour of customer contact — no dispute can be raised without the unboxing video
Mark the complaint as resolved — without evidence, no further action is possible

questions.question: A customer on a BIK chat asks about free shipping. Which of the following is the correct approved answer?

options.text: "Free shipping is available on all prepaid orders above ₹999."
"We offer free delivery on prepaid orders as well as COD orders above ₹1,499. A COD handling fee applies to Cash on Delivery orders."
"All orders above ₹2,000 qualify for free shipping regardless of payment method."
"Free shipping is only available on prepaid orders — COD always incurs a delivery charge."

questions.question: In the Judge.me review flow, which star ratings should be published on Sylvi's product pages?

options.text: 5-star and 4-star reviews — both are positive enough to maintain brand image
All reviews — customers have a right to see unfiltered feedback
5-star reviews only — 4-star and below must be hidden
3-star and above — anything below 3-star is hidden

questions.question: A customer posts a YouTube comment claiming their watch stopped working after 1 month and asking for a full refund. Before replying publicly, what must the Executive do?

options.text: Post a standard "We're sorry to hear this — please DM us" reply immediately to show responsiveness
Escalate to the CRM Asst Manager before replying — product defect complaints in public comments must be escalated first
Direct the customer to call 9687660234 in the comment reply, and close the YouTube thread
Reply publicly with the full warranty policy details so other customers can also see the process

questions.question: Which of the following is a documented common mistake in BIK operations?

options.text: Checking BIK chat history before replying to a customer
Publishing a 4-star review on Judge.me without explicit Asst Manager instruction
Closing a chat after confirming the customer's issue is fully resolved
Using FIMS to verify order details before responding to a delivery query

questions.question: What is the Price Please Automation, and when must it be updated?

options.text: A WhatsApp template that auto-replies to customers who ask for discounts — updated weekly by the Asst Manager
A BIK journey that links a social media post's featured product to an automated price-inquiry reply — must be updated for every new social media post
A FIMS automation that adjusts product prices based on competitor listings — managed by the pricing team
A campaign feature that sends price-drop alerts to customers who viewed a product — triggered manually by the Senior Executive

questions.question: Which warranty coverage statement is correct for a Certified Imperfect watch?

options.text: The 1-year warranty covers both mechanical defects and cosmetic imperfections disclosed at purchase
Certified Imperfect watches carry a 6-month warranty covering only strap and buckle defects
The 1-year warranty covers mechanical defects only; disclosed cosmetic imperfections are not covered
Certified Imperfect watches do not carry any warranty — they are sold as-is

questions.question: A CRM Executive finds an unresolved BIK chat from the previous day when they open the dashboard. What must they do before starting the new day's queue?

options.text: Archive the previous day's chat — chats older than 24 hours are auto-transferred to the Asst Manager
Log the previous day's chat in the BIK sheet as "Closed" to keep the sheet clean, even if unresolved
Resolve all pending or open chats from the previous day before starting new chats — per the pre-execution checklist
Escalate all previous-day chats to the Senior Executive, as Executives only handle same-day chats
